members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: A pair of white rectangular rocker-style light switch plates on the beige painted wall; one is located roughly to the right of the glass door and another slightly lower (one near the sign, another lower near outlet area). Standard plastic finish.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: one switch is slightly left of the picture frame sign, the other is lower and closer to the outlet and stair area
